title: cephalopappus sonchifolius
intro: Cephalopappus sonchifolius, also known as the Sunflower Hawkweed or Sonchi, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower cholesterol and blood pressure, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Cephalopappus sonchifolius is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its roots and leaves can also be used in tinctures and salves for topical applications.
